perspectives.excerpt: US Central Command said on Sunday that a US service member in northern Iraq was killed in action on Saturday during a controlled detonation of a downed Iranian drone. It comes after two US soldiers were killed and one missing by an Iranian attack on a military facility in Jordan. A U.S.…

perspectives.headline: 3 US troops were killed in the Middle East amid Iranian attacks, the Pentagon says
perspectives.excerpt: A US service member died in northern Iraq on Saturday "during a controlled detonation of unexploded ordnance from a downed Iranian one-way attack drone," US Central Command announced. A second service member was wounded. The death came a day after two US service members were killed in Jordan when American and partner forces came under Iranian missile and drone attack.…

perspectives.headline: Gas prices are rising again — and so is GOP grief in the midterms
perspectives.excerpt: Just when Republicans thought they'd caught a break on gas prices, the collapse of President Trump's Iran deal is derailing their best chance to change the inflation story before the midterms. Why it matters: Falling gas prices are one of the most tangible ways to ease voter anger over inflation. Renewed combat — and the threat of escalation — has prices shooting back up.…

perspectives.excerpt: The 2026 FIFA World Cup reaches its climax as Spain take on Argentina in a highly anticipated final. The match pits the defending champions against one of football's rising powers, with Lionel Messi's enduring legacy meeting the emergence of Spain's teenage star Lamine Yamal

perspectives.headline: Netflix paid $587M for Ben Affleck’s AI filmmaking startup
perspectives.excerpt: In a new regulatory filing, Netflix revealed that it paid $587 million in cash for InterPositive, a startup co-founded by actor and director Ben Affleck.…

perspectives.headline: Netflix Reveals the Staggering Price of Its AI Deal With Ben Affleck
perspectives.excerpt: The streaming service paid $587 million to acquire InterPositive, the AI platform developed by the actor to help filmmakers solve postproduction challenges at a fraction of the cost of reshoots.

perspectives.headline: The Kodak EC35 is a pocketable, beginner-friendly 35mm film camera
perspectives.excerpt: The Kodak EC35 is a pocketable, beginner-friendly 35mm film camera The $35 camera comes in seven colors and has a slide cover. There's a new Kodak-branded camera from Charmera-maker Reto, and it's a super-cute point-and-shoot film camera that won't break the bank.…

perspectives.headline: Kodak EC35 is a dirt-cheap point-and-shoot film camera
perspectives.excerpt: Following the success of its $99 Kodak-branded Snapic A1, Reto Project is releasing the Kodak EC35, an even more affordable 35mm film camera for just $34.99. The EC35 certainly isn’t fancy. Its 25mm acrylic lens with a fixed f/10 aperture and 1/100 shutter speed basically put it on par with a drugstore disposable. The fact that it has a manual wind and rewind only emphasizes that.…

perspectives.headline: Messi denied dream farewell as Argentina lose World Cup final to Spain
perspectives.excerpt: Argentina's 1-0 loss to Spain in the 2026 World Cup final on Sunday brought star forward Lionel Messi's dream of winning back-to-back trophies crashing down to earth.

stories.headline_en: Каршеринг врезался в нагрузку // Сумма претензий контрагентов к BelkaCar достигла 972,7 млн рублей

perspectives.excerpt: Каршеринг врезался в нагрузку Сумма претензий контрагентов к BelkaCar достигла 972,7 млн рублей За истекший период 2026 года контрагенты подали к BelkaCar 39 исков на 972,7 млн руб. Количество споров уже превысило показатель за весь прошлый год более чем в два с половиной раза. Основная часть претензий — от лизингодателей, с которыми операторам все сложнее выстраивать отношения.…

perspectives.headline: Каршеринг BelkaCar с начала 2026 года получил от контрагентов 39 исков на общую сумму 972,7 млн рублей
perspectives.excerpt: Основная часть претензий поступила от лизингодателей. Фото «РИА Новости» Операционная компания BelkaCar АО «Каршеринг» в июле 2026 года получила два иска от ООО «Шёлковый путь» на общую сумму 631 млн рублей, а также иск от ООО «Мэйджор профи» на 249,9 млн руб, пишет «Ъ» со ссылкой на данные СПАРК.Всего контрагенты BelkaCar с начала 2026 года подали к каршерингу 39 исков в общей сложности на 972,7 …
